notes: Acquired by Sun 1998; evolved into Sun Application Server / iPlanet; eventually superseded by J2EE servers
CGI was the scalability bottleneck that NetDynamics bypassed; still technically available but obsolete
CICS, TUXEDO, Encina; NetDynamics reinvented TP monitor concept for web; evolved into modern app servers
NetDynamics auto-generated server-side Java; prescient adoption of Java before J2EE
Superseded by servlet containers and modern web server frameworks
Three-tier web/middleware/DB architecture pioneered by tools like NetDynamics
Merant acquired Intersolv; PVCS superseded by Git-based VCS
